mapper.insert:
select doc_seq.nextval from dual
insert into draft_documents values (#{doc_seq}, #{title}, #{doc_type}, #{users_id}, #{status}, null, #{is_temp}, TO_DATE(#{temp_expires_at, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), sysdate, sysdate)
insert into approval_lines values (line_seq.nextval, #{doc_seq}, #{users_id}, #{step_order}, #{status}, null, null)
insert into vacation values (vac_seq.nextval, #{doc_seq}, #{vac_type}, #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{end_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{days}, #{reason})

select pay_seq.nextval from dual
insert into payment values (#{pay_seq}, #{doc_seq}, #{pay_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{total_amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pay_reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{account_info, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into payment_items values (pa_item_seq.nextval, #{pay_seq}, #{item_order, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{note, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sysname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oriname, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select purchase_seq.nextval from dual
insert into purchase values (#{purchase_seq}, #{doc_seq}, #{total_amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{purpose, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vendor, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchase_date, jdbcType=DATE})

insert into purchase_items values (p_item_seq.nextval, #{purchase_seq}, #{item_order, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ea, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{unit_price, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{total_price, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{note, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select d.doc_seq as "doc_seq", d.title as "title", d.doc_type as "doc_type", d.users_id as "users_id", d.status as "status", d.reject_reason as "reject_reason", d.is_temp as "is_temp", TO_CHAR(d.temp_expires_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "temp_expires_at", TO_CHAR(d.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "created_at", TO_CHAR(d.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "updated_at", u.name as "name", u.users_seq as "users_seq", dept.dept_name as "dept_name", r.rank_name as "rank_name" from draft_documents d left outer join users u on d.users_id = u.id left outer join departments dept on u.dept_seq = dept.dept_seq left outer join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where d.doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select a.line_seq as "line_seq", a.doc_seq as "doc_seq", a.users_id as "users_id", a.step_order as "step_order", a.status as "status", TO_CHAR(a.handle_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "handle_at", a.reject_reason as "reject_reason", u.name as "name", r.rank_name as "rank_name" from approval_lines a join users u on a.users_id = u.id join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where a.doc_seq = #{doc_seq} order by a.step_order

select a.cc_seq as "cc_seq", a.doc_seq as "doc_seq", a.users_id as "users_id", u.name as "name", d.dept_name as "dept_name" from approval_cc a join users u on a.users_id = u.id join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq where a.doc_seq = #{doc_seq} order by a.cc_seq

select vac_seq as "vac_seq", doc_seq as "doc_seq", vac_type as "vac_type", TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "start_date", TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "end_date", days as "days", reason as "reason" from vacation where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select pay_seq as "pay_seq", doc_seq as "doc_seq", TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "pay_date", total_amount as "total_amount", pay_reason as "pay_reason", account_info as "account_info" from payment where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select purchase_seq as "purchase_seq", doc_seq as "doc_seq", total_amount as "total_amount", purpose as "purpose", vendor as "vendor", TO_CHAR(purchase_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "purchase_date" from purchase where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select item_seq as "item_seq", pay_seq as "pay_seq", item_order as "item_order", item_name as "item_name", amount as "amount", note as "note", sysname as "sysname", oriname as "oriname" from payment_items where pay_seq = #{pay_seq} order by item_order

select item_seq as "item_seq", purchase_seq as "purchase_seq", item_order as "item_order", item_name as "item_name", ea as "ea", unit_price as "unit_price", total_price as "total_price", note as "note" from purchase_items where purchase_seq = #{purchase_seq} order by item_order

select attachment_seq as "attachment_seq", purchase_seq as "purchase_seq", oriname as "oriname", sysname as "sysname", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "created_at" from purchase_attachments where purchase_seq = #{purchase_seq} order by attachment_seq
select users_id as "users_id", step_order as "step_order" from approval_lines where doc_seq = #{doc_seq} and step_order = #{step_order} + 1
mapper.update: update approval_lines set status = #{status}, handle_at = sysdate where doc_seq = #{doc_seq} and users_id = #{users_id}
update approval_lines set status = #{status} where doc_seq = #{doc_seq} and users_id = #{users_id}
update draft_documents set status = #{status} where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}
update approval_lines set status = #{status}, handle_at = sysdate, reject_reason = #{reject_reason} where doc_seq = #{doc_seq} and users_id = #{users_id}
update draft_documents set status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{reject_reason} where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}
mapper.select: select d.users_id as "users_id", v.days as "days" from draft_documents d join vacation v on d.doc_seq = v.doc_seq where d.doc_seq = #{doc_seq}
mapper.update: update draft_documents set title = #{title}, status = #{status}, is_temp = #{is_temp}, temp_expires_at = TO_DATE(#{temp_expires_at, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), created_at = sysdate, updated_at = sysdate where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}
update general set purpose = #{purpose, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}
mapper.select: select pay_seq from payment where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}
select purchase_seq from purchase where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select count(*) from approval_lines al JOIN draft_documents d ON al.doc_seq = d.doc_seq where al.users_id = #{users_id} and al.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' and TO_CHAR(d.created_at, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')
select count(*) from draft_documents where users_id = #{users_id} and status = 'IN_PROGRESS' and TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')
select count(*) from draft_documents where users_id = #{users_id} and status = 'APPROVED' and TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')
select count(*) from draft_documents where users_id = #{users_id} and status = 'REJECTED' and TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')

select * from ( select d.doc_seq as "doc_seq", d.title as "title", d.doc_type as "doc_type", TO_CHAR(d.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "created_at", d.status as "status", u.name as "approver_name", u.sysname as "sysname", r.rank_name as "approver_rank" from draft_documents d left join approval_lines al on d.doc_seq = al.doc_seq and al.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' left join users u on al.users_id = u.id left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where d.users_id = #{users_id} and d.is_temp = 0 order by d.created_at desc ) where rownum <= 5
select d.*, u.name as name from draft_documents d inner join users u on d.users_id = u.id inner join approval_cc c on d.doc_seq = c.doc_seq where c.users_id = #{loginId} order by d.created_at desc

select a.line_seq, a.doc_seq, a.users_id, a.step_order, a.status, a.handle_at, a.reject_reason, u.name as name, r.rank_name as rank_name, u.sysname as sysname
from approval_lines a inner join users u on a.users_id = u.id inner join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where a.doc_seq = #{doc_seq} order by a.step_order
select d.*, u.name as name from draft_documents d inner join users u on d.users_id = u.id where d.users_id = #{loginId} order by d.created_at desc

select d.*, u.name as name, u.sysname as sysname, a.status as app_status from approval_lines a inner join draft_documents d on a.doc_seq = d.doc_seq inner join users u on d.users_id = u.id where a.users_id = #{loginId} and a.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' order by d.created_at
select * from draft_documents where users_id = #{loginId} and status = 'TEMP' order by updated_at desc
select * from draft_documents where status = 'TEMP' and temp_expires_at <= sysdate
select pay_seq from payment where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}
select sysname from payment_items where pay_seq = #{pay_seq}
select purchase_seq from purchase where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}
select sysname from purchase_attachments where purchase_seq = #{purchase_seq}
